summary: Iteration 19: Complete E2E testing of Job Role Normalization via Keywords Mapping system. All 19 backend tests pass, all frontend tests pass. The feature allows creating keyword mappings to normalize job titles into canonical roles.

backend: POST /api/job-keyword-mappings creates a new mapping with job_role and keywords
PUT /api/job-keyword-mappings/{id} returns 400 for invalid ID format
GET /api/job-roles returns normalized role names with counts
GET /api/summary groups by normalized job role
GET /api/applicants shows normalized job_role in response
GET /api/attended shows normalized job_role in response
GET /api/applicants?jobRole=X filters by normalized job role
GET /api/attended?jobRole=X filters by normalized job role
GET /api/applicants with non-matching filter returns empty data array (not error)
GET /api/attended with non-matching filter returns empty data array (not error)
GET /api/summary with non-matching search returns empty data array (not error)
frontend: Dashboard shows 'Jobs & Keywords' nav button (data-testid: nav-jobs-keywords-btn)
/jobs-keywords page loads with empty state when no mappings exist
Add Mapping button (data-testid: add-mapping-btn) opens modal
Add Mapping modal has role input (data-testid: role-input)
Add Mapping modal has keyword input (data-testid: keyword-input)
Pressing Enter in keyword input adds keyword pill
Save button (data-testid: save-mapping-btn) creates mapping via API
Success toast 'Mapping created' shows after save
Edit button (data-testid: edit-mapping-{id}) opens modal with pre-filled data
Edit modal shows 'Edit Mapping' title and 'Update' button
Update saves changes and shows 'Mapping updated' toast
/roles page shows table headers even when data is empty (data-testid: empty-state-row)
/attended-roles page shows table headers even when data is empty (data-testid: empty-state-row)
/summary page shows table headers even when data is empty (data-testid: empty-state-row)

seed_data_creation: Test keyword mappings created and deleted during testing (TEST_ prefixed mappings cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job Role Normalization via Keywords Mapping fully tested and working. The feature includes: (1) CRUD endpoints at /api/job-keyword-mappings for managing keyword mappings, (2) _resolve_normalized_job_role helper function that matches keywords in job titles to canonical roles, (3) /api/job-roles, /api/summary, /api/applicants, /api/attended all use normalized job roles, (4) Filtering by jobRole works with normalized names, (5) Frontend /jobs-keywords page with Add/Edit/Delete modal for managing mappings, (6) Empty state table fix applied to /roles, /attended-roles, /summary pages - table headers remain visible with 'No records found' row when data is empty.
